subcodes.first_line: The Voice of the All-Merciful hath given glad tidings unto all who dwell in the realm of contingent being, that the divine Promise hath been made manifest, and that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هاتف رحمن جمیع من فی الامکان را مژده داد که وعده الهی ظاهر شد و آنچه در
subcodes.subjects: @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @prophecy and fulfillment, @return of the Manifestations of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
